problem id: 27edb680
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) OR SHR(4)

examples:
  10100011 -> 10001110
  10000111 -> 00011110
  10100110 -> 10011010
  10110100 -> 11011011
  01101111 -> 10111111
  11101101 -> 10111111
  00011001 -> 01100101
  11111001 -> 11101111
  00101111 -> 10111110
  10101100 -> 10111010

query: 11101010
predicted answer: 10101111
